ddls:
CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration parameter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration parameter */,
  "required" TEXT /* Indicates if the parameter is required or optional */,
  "value" TEXT /* Current value of the parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter's purpose and usage */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the configuration value (e.g., integer, boolean, string) */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value allowed for numeric configurations */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value allowed for numeric configurations */,
  "allowed_values" TEXT /* List of allowed values for the configuration */,
  "is_editable" TEXT /* Indicates if the configuration can be edited after initial setup */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client application */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client administrator */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the client (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the client was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the client's information */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who added the client */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the client's information */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the node */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the node (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "load" REAL /* Current load on the node (e.g., in percentage) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the node was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the node's information */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or logical location of the node */,
  "hardware_spec" TEXT /* Details about the node's hardware */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software running on the node */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the node was seen as active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queues" (
  "queue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message queue */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node associated with the queue */,
  "current_size" INTEGER /* Current number of messages in the queue */,
  "max_size" INTEGER /* Maximum allowable size for the queue */,
  "wait_time" INTEGER /* Maximum wait time for messages in the queue (in seconds) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the queue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the queue's information */,
  "high_priority_count" INTEGER /* Number of high-priority messages in the queue */,
  "low_priority_count" INTEGER /* Number of low-priority messages in the queue */,
  "last_processed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last message processed from the queue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("queue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queues_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node for which metrics are recorded */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metrics were collected */,
  "processing_time" REAL /* Average processing time of messages (in milliseconds) */,
  "message_count" INTEGER /* Total number of messages processed during the period */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage percentage */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage percentage */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Disk usage percentage */,
  "network_in" TEXT /* Incoming network traffic (in bytes) */,
  "network_out" TEXT /* Outgoing network traffic (in bytes) */,
  "error_count" INTEGER /* Number of errors encountered during the period */,
  "total_messages_processed" INTEGER /* Total number of messages processed during the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role's information */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account's information */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the configuration */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the configuration */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete, add) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_changes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_changes_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was logged */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the action */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node associated with the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log entry */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node where the error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Detailed error message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error was logged */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the error */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the error */,
  "stack_trace" TEXT /* Stack trace of the error for troubleshooting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)
